pr.title: feat(spe-2159): investigation exposure and fuzzy-clue registry (slice 1)
pr.body:
Investigation clues carry inherent uncertainty — they may be true, fuzzy, incomplete, partially false, or deliberately misleading. This slice adds a pure domain registry that models clue clarity and exposure risk without discarding uncertain clues.

## New: `src/domain/investigationExposureClueRegistry.ts`

- **`ClueClarity`** union: `'true' | 'fuzzy' | 'incomplete' | 'partial_false' | 'misleading'`
- **`ExposureRiskBand`**: `'controlled' | 'low' | 'moderate' | 'high' | 'critical'` — follows `MissionRiskBand` convention
- **`InvestigationExposureClueRecord`** / **`InvestigationExposureClueRegistry`** typed interfaces
- Set-backed type guards: `isClueClarity`, `isExposureRiskBand`
- Issue-array validators: `validateInvestigationExposureClueRecord`, `validateInvestigationExposureClueRegistry`
- `getInvestigationExposureClueById` — registry lookup
- `projectClueActionability` — deterministic projection:
  - `isActionable`: clarity ≠ `misleading` (fuzzy/incomplete/partial_false retain usable signal)
  - `isUncertain`: clarity ≠ `true`
  - `isHazardousToInvestigate`: band is `high` or `critical`
- `DEFAULT_INVESTIGATION_EXPOSURE_CLUE_REGISTRY` — five frozen entries, one per clarity value

```ts
const projection = projectClueActionability(getInvestigationExposureClueById(
  DEFAULT_INVESTIGATION_EXPOSURE_CLUE_REGISTRY,
  'clue:planted-transaction-record'  // clarity: 'partial_false'
)!)
// { isActionable: true, isUncertain: true, isHazardousToInvestigate: false }
```

## New: `src/test/investigationExposureClueRegistry.test.ts`

15 tests: every clarity value, invalid clarity/band rejection, duplicate-id detection, fuzzy/partial clues staying actionable (not discarded), and a deterministic full-registry projection snapshot.
pr.author: Copilot
